mnemonics: CATS Deploy WARs: Container (Tomcat) Accepts Servlet Web Archives for Running
keyPoints: Tomcat is an open-source implementation of Java Servlet, JSP, and other web technologies.
The web application must be packaged as a WAR (Web Application Archive) file for deployment.
The WEB-INF directory is a special protected folder containing web.xml and libraries.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to start the Tomcat server before trying to access the application.
Placing web content (HTML, JSP) inside the WEB-INF folder, making it inaccessible to direct client requests.
